question: Which comparison is most accurate (Rainforest Conservation and Environmental Change)?

options.A: deforestation can reduce evapotranspiration, while intact rainforest returns moisture to the atmosphere
options.C: moisture recycling occurs only in oceans

answer_text: deforestation can reduce evapotranspiration, while intact rainforest returns moisture to the atmosphere
explanation: Trees transpire water vapor and help maintain moisture recycling.
fun_fact: Forests do not just receive rain; they send some back upstairs.
learning_objective: Compare intact and cleared forest effects.
